notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ali Sánchez reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by shortstop Zach McKinstry. Max Schuemann to 3rd. Max Schuemann advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by shortstop Zach McKinstry.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter grounds into a double play, second baseman José Caballero to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Kerry Carpenter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kerry Carpenter rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kerry Carpenter grounds into a double play, second baseman José Caballero to shortstop Anthony Volpe to first baseman Paul Goldschmidt. Kevin McGonigle out at 2nd. Kerry Carpenter out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Zach McKinstry reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by second baseman José Caballero. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Zach McKinstry to 2nd. Spencer Torkelson advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by second baseman José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Paul Goldschmidt GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Paul Goldschmidt grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach McKinstry to second baseman Hao-Yu Lee to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Max Schuemann scores. Ali Sánchez out at 2nd. Paul Goldschmidt out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
